conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (CSV export download + header-row decode; the response is text/csv, not JSON, so the standard fixtures/streams/<stream>/page_N.json JSON-body replay envelope cannot represent this wire shape); hook-covered, proven by internal/connectors/hooks/appsflyer/hooks_test.go
